channel.title: H5P on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in H5P on LiaScript

item.title: H5P in LiaScript: Embed Interactive H5P Content in Courses
item.description: H5P is a widely used open-source framework for interactive HTML5 content: drag-and-drop exercises, video quizzes, flashcards, branching scenarios, interactive maps, and dozens more activity types. The H5P-Test repository by André Dietrich demonstrates how to embed H5P content from h5p.org (or any compatible LRS) directly inside a LiaScript course using a plain HTML <iframe>.

item.title: LiaEx: Funding for the LiaScript-Exporter
item.description: We are thrilled to announce that our LiaScript-Exporter, now developed under the name LiaEx, has received funding through the OE_Sprints program of the German Federal Ministry for Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth (BMBFSFJ)! 🎉
